## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 20, 2026*

### Superconductivity (8 new today)

1. The study focuses on the kagome superconductor RbV₃Sb₅, employing magnetoresistance measurements to address the origin of magnetic hysteresis and intertwined orders within its superconducting state.
2. The study focuses on a sign-problem-free model of SU(4) interacting fermions, employing theoretical modeling to solve the challenge of realizing robust, high-temperature charge-4e superconductivity in two dimensions.
3. The study focuses on a junction between a superconductor and an SSH topological insulator chain, employing the functional integration method to address the corrections to the quasiparticle spectrum induced by the superconducting proximity effect.
4. The study focuses on bilayer Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates (La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇, employing synthesis and characterization to address the unresolved electronic reorganization enabling superconductivity in these materials.
5. The study focuses on superconducting diodes, employing a mapping onto quantum technology architecture to address fundamental challenges in control and scalability for nonreciprocal quantum circuit elements.
6. The study focuses on Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊δ intrinsic Josephson junctions, employing direct ultraviolet laser micromachining to solve the fabrication challenge for rapid, maskless production of terahertz plasma emitters.
7. The study focuses on quantum critical metals, employing a classification scheme based on projective fixed points to address the characterization of diverse non-Fermi liquids and their universal superconducting fluctuations from q=0 critical modes.
8. The study focuses on the attractive SU(4) Hubbard model, employing large-scale quantum Monte Carlo simulations to address the realization and deconfined pseudocriticality of charge-4e superconductivity at zero temperature.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on the quantum spin liquid candidate herbertsmithite, employing a theoretical model of spinon-mediated interactions to address the role of inter-kagome copper impurities as witness spins probing the spinon continuum.
2. The study focuses on the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model, employing a rigorous mathematical analysis of the TAP (Thouless-Anderson-Palmer) equations and free energy to address the problem of characterizing its infinite-volume limit and pure states.
3. The study focuses on the Hopfield model, employing a statistical physics approach to address the problem of understanding its equilibrium phase diagram and the nature of its spin glass phase in the non-convex regime.
4. The study focuses on the p-spin spherical spin glass model, employing dynamical mean-field theory and numerical simulations to address the problem of characterizing its out-of-equilibrium aging dynamics and violation of the fluctuation-dissipation theorem.
5. The study focuses on the Edwards-Anderson spin glass model, employing large-scale Monte Carlo simulations and finite-size scaling to address the problem of determining the existence and nature of a finite-temperature spin glass phase transition in three dimensions.

| 1 | **[Pseudo-spin-polarized topological superconductivity in kagome RbV$_3$Sb$_5$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.10998v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Kagome superconductors AV$_3$Sb$_5$ (A=K, Rb, Cs) have sparked considerable interest due to the presence of several intertwined symmetry-breaking phases within a single material. Interestingly, in a recent experiment, magnetic hysteresis was observed in the superconducting state through magnetoresistance measurements in RbV$_{3}$Sb$_{5}$ [Nature Comm \textbf{17}, 1310 (2026)], providing strong evidence of a spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking superconducting state. The magnetic hysteresis, combined with crystalline symmetry, imposes strong constraints on the possible pairing symmetries of the superconducting state. In this work, we propose that RbV$_3$Sb$_5$ is a nodal topological superconductor with pseudo-spin-polarized Cooper pairs. The pseudo-spin-polarized superconducting domains resemble the properties of ferromagnetic domains and induce hysteresis. Moreover, the nodal topological superconducting state possesses Majorana flat band modes at the sample boundary, which can be detected by tunneling experiments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Kagome超导体AV$_3$Sb$_5$（A=K，Rb，Cs）由于在单一材料中存在多个相互交织的对称性破缺相而引发了广泛关注。有趣的是，在最近的一项实验中，通过RbV$_{3}$Sb$_{5}$的磁阻测量，在超导态中观察到了磁滞现象[Nature Comm \textbf{17}, 1310 (2026)]，这为时间反演对称性自发破缺的超导态提供了有力证据。磁滞现象结合晶体对称性，对超导态可能的配对对称性施加了严格的限制。在这项工作中，我们提出RbV$_3$Sb$_5$是一种具有赝自旋极化库珀对的节点拓扑超导体。赝自旋极化的超导畴类似于铁磁畴的性质并引发磁滞。此外，该节点拓扑超导态在样品边界拥有马约拉纳平带模式，可通过隧穿实验探测。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Xilin Feng et al. |
| 2 | **[High-temperature charge-4e superconductivity in SU(4) interacting fermions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15056v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The condensation of electron quartets, known as charge-4e superconductivity (SC), represents a novel quantum state of matter beyond the standard paradigm of Cooper pairing. However, concrete microscopic models realizing this phase in two dimensions remain a central challenge. Here, we introduce a non-engineered and sign-problem-free model, unambiguously demonstrating the emergence of a robust and high-temperature charge-4e SC phase using unbiased quantum Monte Carlo simulations. At zero temperature, the phase diagram reveals that charge-4e SC is the primary ground state in the strong-coupling regime. At finite temperature in the absence of charge-2e SC, we identify charge-4e SC through a Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transition, marked by a universal jump in the superfluid stiffness consistent with a condensate of charge 4e. Remarkably, the transition temperature Tc increases nearly linearly with interaction strength, providing a robust mechanism for high-Tc quartet superconductivity. Furthermore, spectral analysis reveals a prominent pseudogap above Tc arising from strong phase fluctuations. Our results establish a canonical and numerically exact model system for charge-4e superconductivity, offering crucial guidance for its realization in experimental platforms such as moiré materials and ultracold atomic systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>电子四重凝聚，即电荷-4e超导，代表了一种超越标准库珀配对范式的新颖量子物质态。然而，在二维中实现该相的具体微观模型仍然是一个核心挑战。在此，我们引入了一个非人为设计且无符号问题的模型，利用无偏量子蒙特卡洛模拟明确地证明了稳健且高温的电荷-4e超导相的出现。在零温下，相图显示电荷-4e超导是强耦合区域的主要基态。在有限温度且不存在电荷-2e超导的情况下，我们通过Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless相变识别出电荷-4e超导，其特征是超流刚度存在与电荷4e凝聚体一致的普适跳跃。值得注意的是，相变温度Tc随相互作用强度近乎线性增加，这为高温四重态超导性提供了一个稳健的机制。此外，谱分析揭示了Tc以上由强相位涨落引起的显著赝能隙。我们的研究结果为电荷-4e超导性建立了一个典范且数值精确的模型系统，为其在莫尔材料和超冷原子系统等实验平台中的实现提供了关键指导。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Shao-Hang Shi et al. |
| 3 | **[Superconducting Proximity Effect in an SSH-Superconductor Junction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.24501v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A model of microscopic interaction between a superconductor and a one-dimensional topological insulator, an SSH chain, is considered. Using the functional integration method, the effective action of the interaction between a superconductor and a topological insulator is obtained. We obtain corrections to the quasiparticle excitation spectrum of the SSH chain due to tunneling in various limits and discuss the influence of phase fluctuations. We find that for bulk superconductors, the states of the chain are stable for energies lying inside the superconducting gap while in lower-dimensional superconductors phase fluctuations yield finite temperature-dependent lifetimes even inside the gap. We also discuss whether these results can be reproduced within a simple phenomenological approach.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本文研究了一个超导体与一维拓扑绝缘体（即SSH链）之间微观相互作用的模型。利用泛函积分方法，得到了超导体与拓扑绝缘体相互作用的有效作用量。我们获得了在不同极限下由于隧穿效应导致的SSH链准粒子激发谱的修正，并讨论了相位涨落的影响。我们发现，对于体超导体，当能量位于超导能隙内时，链上的态是稳定的；而在低维超导体中，相位涨落会导致即使在能隙内也存在依赖于温度的有限寿命。我们还讨论了这些结果是否可以在简单的唯象方法中复现。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | I. A. Belkovich et al. |
| 4 | **[Interlayer hybridization enables superconductivity in bilayer nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14701v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates offer a new route to high-temperature superconductivity beyond the cuprates and iron-pnictides. However, the electronic reorganization that enables superconductivity in bilayer nickelates remain unresolved, largely due to the difficulty of directly probing the superconducting phase. Here, we overcome this limitation by stabilizing superconducting (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films with a protective capping layer, thereby enabling direct spectroscopic access via X-ray absorption and resonant inelastic X-ray scattering. We resolve the evolution of in-plane and out-of-plane electronic states, spin and orbital excitations, and spin-density-waves across insulating, superconducting, and metallic regimes. Combining experimental results with theoretical analysis, we show that the in-plane $d_{x^2-y^2}$ states form an itinerant backbone, while superconductivity emerges only when coherent $d_{z^2}$-$p_z$-$d_{z^2}$ interlayer hybridization develops, accompanied by suppressed static spin order and strongly damped spin excitations. Oxygen stoichiometry and epitaxial strain both act on this interlayer channel, placing superconductivity within a narrow window of interlayer coherence and correlation strength. These findings identify the microscopic ingredients required for superconductivity in bilayer nickelates and provide a multiorbital picture of its emergence.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐为超越铜酸盐和铁基超导体的高温超导性提供了一条新途径。然而，在双层镍酸盐中实现超导性的电子重组过程仍未解决，这主要由于直接探测超导相的困难。在此，我们通过使用保护性覆盖层稳定超导(La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$薄膜，克服了这一限制，从而能够通过X射线吸收和共振非弹性X射线散射进行直接谱学探测。我们解析了在绝缘、超导和金属区域中，面内与面外电子态、自旋与轨道激发以及自旋密度波的演化。结合实验结果与理论分析，我们表明面内$d_{x^2-y^2}$态形成了一个巡游骨架，而超导性仅当相干的$d_{z^2}$-$p_z$-$d_{z^2}$层间杂化发展起来时才出现，并伴随着静态自旋序的抑制和强烈阻尼的自旋激发。氧化学计量比和外延应变都作用于这个层间通道，将超导性限制在层间相干性和关联强度的狭窄窗口内。这些发现确定了双层镍酸盐中超导性所需的微观要素，并为其出现提供了一个多轨道图像。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Shilong Zhang et al. |
| 5 | **[Quantum Landscape of Superconducting Diodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14623v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>This study maps the quantum landscape of superconducting diodes (SDs) \cite{nadeem23} onto the quantum technology architecture, which is currently constrained by fundamental challenges in control and scalability. In the existing non-integrated quantum technology hardware, control and scalability related issues emerge at two fronts: First, nonlinear and nonreciprocal circuit elements, which are essential building blocks for quantum processors, are often complex, bulky, and dissipative. Second, the temperature gradient between classical control electronics ($T_C\gtrsim$ K), which is also dissipative, and the quantum processor at cryogenic temperatures ($T_Q\sim$ mK) makes scalability even more challenging. The main focus is to reveal how the built-in nonlinearity, nonreciprocity, and quantum functionalities of SDs are significant for on-chip integrated circuit quantum electrodynamics (c-QED), enabling scalable integration of noise-resilient qubit and qubit-interfaces for efficient power delivery, coherent control and memory, high-fidelity readout, and quantum-limited amplification. To this end, this study will also shed light on how thermodynamic constraints and field effects can be harnessed within a quantum-enhanced SD platform, thereby enabling thermal compatibility between classical and quantum workflows, isothermal all-electrical control, and on-chip scalability. This perspective is expected to play a pivotal role in the advancement of superconducting circuit-based quantum hardware with temperature-matched classical, quantum, and hybrid workflows.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本研究将超导二极管（SDs）的量子前景映射到量子技术架构上，该架构目前受限于控制和可扩展性方面的根本性挑战。在现有的非集成量子技术硬件中，与控制和可扩展性相关的问题出现在两个方面：首先，作为量子处理器基本构建模块的非线性和非互易电路元件，通常复杂、笨重且具有耗散性。其次，经典控制电子学（$T_C\gtrsim$ K，同样具有耗散性）与处于低温（$T_Q\sim$ mK）的量子处理器之间的温度梯度，使得可扩展性更具挑战性。本文主要聚焦于揭示SDs固有的非线性、非互易性和量子功能对于片上集成电路量子电动力学（c-QED）的重要意义，它能实现抗噪声量子比特和量子比特接口的可扩展集成，用于高效功率传输、相干控制与存储、高保真度读取以及量子极限放大。为此，本研究还将阐明如何在量子增强的SD平台内利用热力学约束和场效应，从而实现经典与量子工作流之间的热兼容性、等温全电控制以及片上可扩展性。这一视角有望在基于超导电路的量子硬件发展中发挥关键作用，实现温度匹配的经典、量子和混合工作流。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Muhammad Nadeem et al. |
| 6 | **[Direct laser micromachining of superconducting terahertz Josephson plasma emitters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14485v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We demonstrate a rapid, maskless fabrication method for superconducting terahertz Josephson plasma emitters (JPEs) based on direct ultraviolet laser micromachining of Bi$_2$Sr$_2$CaCu$_2$O$_{8+δ}$ (Bi-2212) single crystals. Although machining debris is formed near the processed regions, uniform stacks of intrinsic Josephson junctions are preserved inside the crystal, enabling stable terahertz emission. Devices fabricated with Ag, Cu, and Cr electrodes all exhibited terahertz radiation, with Cu electrodes showing performance comparable to Ag while offering a low-cost alternative. Spectroscopic and polarization analyses indicate that the emitted radiation is elliptically polarized and dominated by the geometrical cavity resonance mode. Structural and electrical characterizations reveal that the machining width and depth are not limited by the optical spot size but are governed by the anisotropic thermal conductivity of Bi-2212, consistent with a thermally dominated laser ablation process. This direct laser micromachining approach provides a fast and versatile fabrication technique for JPEs and is broadly applicable to superconducting electronics and terahertz devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们展示了一种基于紫外激光直接微加工Bi$_2$Sr$_2$CaCu$_2$O$_{8+δ}$（Bi-2212）单晶的超快、无掩模太赫兹约瑟夫森等离子体发射器（JPEs）制备方法。尽管在加工区域附近会形成加工碎屑，但晶体内部的本征约瑟夫森结堆叠结构保持完好，从而实现了稳定的太赫兹发射。采用银、铜和铬电极制备的器件均表现出太赫兹辐射，其中铜电极的性能与银电极相当，同时提供了低成本的替代方案。光谱和偏振分析表明，发射的辐射为椭圆偏振，且主要由几何腔共振模式主导。结构和电学表征揭示，加工宽度和深度不受光学光斑尺寸的限制，而是由Bi-2212的各向异性热导率决定，这与热主导的激光烧蚀过程一致。这种直接激光微加工方法为JPEs提供了一种快速且多功能的制备技术，并广泛适用于超导电子学和太赫兹器件。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | Reo Yamaguchi et al. |
| 7 | **[Classification of non-Fermi liquids and universal superconducting fluctuations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.21047v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In quantum critical metals, a plethora of different non-Fermi liquids arises depending on the nature of critical fluctuations coupled to Fermi surfaces. In this paper, we classify non-Fermi liquids that arise from q=0 critical fluctuations and characterize their universal superconducting fluctuations. The essential tool is the projective fixed points, which generalizes the notion of fixed points to fixed trajectories that take into account the incessant running of the Fermi momentum under the renormalization group flow. Based on the topology of bundles of projective fixed points, non-Fermi liquids are first grouped into seven superuniversality classes. Each superuniversality class includes multiple universality classes, which are further classified by the universal pairing interactions and emergent symmetries. Despite the pairing interaction generated by critical fluctuations, some non-Fermi liquids remain stable down to zero temperature due to the incoherence of excitations and the lack of scale invariance caused by Fermi momentum. Depending on the strength and span of the universal pairing interaction in momentum space, the emergent symmetry of non-Fermi liquids may or may not be lower than that of Fermi liquids. In non-Fermi liquids that become superconductors at low temperatures, the universal data of the parent metal determine the lower bound for the superconducting transition temperature and the associated pairing symmetry. In superuniversality classes that contain non-Fermi liquids prone to non-s-wave superconducting instabilities, the critical angular momentum above which pairing instability becomes inevitable is sensitive to the Fermi momentum, and the associated superconducting transition temperature oscillates as a function of the density. We use physical examples, as well as a toy model, to elucidate the universal low-energy physics of all superuniversality classes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在量子临界金属中，根据与费米面耦合的临界涨落的性质，会出现多种不同的非费米液体。本文中，我们对由q=0临界涨落产生的非费米液体进行分类，并刻画其普适的超导涨落特性。核心工具是投影不动点，它将不动点的概念推广到考虑了重正化群流下费米动量持续演化的不动轨迹。基于投影不动点丛的拓扑结构，非费米液体首先被划分为七个超普适类。每个超普适类包含多个普适类，这些普适类进一步通过普适配对相互作用和涌现对称性进行划分。尽管临界涨落会产生配对相互作用，但由于激发的非相干性以及费米动量导致的标度不变性缺失，一些非费米液体在零温下仍保持稳定。根据动量空间中普适配对相互作用的强度和范围，非费米液体的涌现对称性可能低于也可能不低于费米液体。在低温下转变为超导体的非费米液体中，母体金属的普适数据决定了超导转变温度的下限以及相关的配对对称性。在包含易于发生非s波超导失稳的非费米液体的超普适类中，配对失稳变得不可避免所需的临界角动量对费米动量敏感，并且相关的超导转变温度随密度变化而振荡。我们使用物理实例以及一个玩具模型，来阐明所有超普适类的普适低能物理。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | Shubham Kukreja et al. |
| 8 | **[Quantum Charge-4e Superconductivity and Deconfined Pseudocriticality in the Attractive SU(4) Hubbard Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14289v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Unlike conventional charge-2e superconductors, a charge-4e superconductor exhibits long-range coherence of electron quartets rather than Cooper pairs. Clear zero-temperature realizations of charge-4e superconductivity remain rare. Here, we investigate the zero-temperature phase diagram of the attractive SU(4) Hubbard model with numerically exact, large-scale quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) simulations overcoming major technical hurdles. We identify both charge-2e and charge-4e superconducting phases. Upon increasing interaction, charge-2e correlations are suppressed and eventually vanish, while the charge-4e correlations remain robust and converge with system size, signaling the onset of a quartet-condensed phase. Interestingly, across the charge-2e--charge-4e transition, single electrons remain gapped, while charge-2e correlations exhibit a scaling behavior inconsistent with a conventional Landau description. These features are naturally captured by a fractionalized framework in which the physical charge-2e order parameter is a composite field coupled to an emergent non-Abelian gauge structure. We formulate an Sp(4) gauge-Higgs theory that realizes deconfined quantum pseudocriticality between the Higgs (charge-2e) phase and the confined (charge-4e) phase. The Sp(4) gauge-Higgs theory yields pseudocriticality through a fixed-point collision, and its one-loop collision-point exponents quantitatively track the QMC results. Our results establish charge-4e superconductivity as a bona fide zero-temperature phase, provide a simple model for future studies in a numerically exact framework, and reveal an unconventional route to superconducting criticality.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>与传统的电荷-2e超导体不同，电荷-4e超导体表现出电子四重态而非库珀对的长程相干性。电荷-4e超导性的明确零温实现仍然罕见。在此，我们通过克服主要技术障碍的数值精确、大规模量子蒙特卡罗（QMC）模拟，研究了具有吸引相互作用的SU(4)哈伯德模型的零温相图。我们识别出了电荷-2e和电荷-4e超导相。随着相互作用增强，电荷-2e关联被抑制并最终消失，而电荷-4e关联保持稳健且随系统尺寸收敛，标志着四重态凝聚相的开始。有趣的是，在电荷-2e到电荷-4e的转变过程中，单电子能隙保持存在，而电荷-2e关联表现出与传统的朗道描述不一致的标度行为。这些特征自然地由一个分数量子化框架所捕捉，其中物理的电荷-2e序参量是一个与涌现的非阿贝尔规范结构耦合的复合场。我们构建了一个Sp(4)规范-希格斯理论，该理论实现了希格斯（电荷-2e）相与禁闭（电荷-4e）相之间的去禁闭量子赝临界性。Sp(4)规范-希格斯理论通过不动点碰撞产生赝临界性，其一阶碰撞点指数定量地追踪了QMC结果。我们的研究确立了电荷-4e超导性是一个真正的零温相，为未来在数值精确框架下的研究提供了一个简单模型，并揭示了一条通向超导临界性的非常规路径。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | Zhou-Quan Wan et al. |
| 9 | **[Crystal structure effects on vortex dynamics in superconducting MgB$_2$ thin films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14022v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The current-driven resistive transition is central to superconducting single-photon detectors, transition-edge sensors, and fluxonic devices. Depending on sample uniformity, dimensions, and heat removal, it can be driven by phase-slip events, flux-flow instabilities (FFI), or normal-domain formation. Here, we investigate the influence of two types of microstructural defects on vortex dynamics in MgB$_2$ films: columnar growth in textured films and buffer-layer roughness in single-crystal films. The current-voltage ($I$-$V$) curves measured at $T \approx 0.25 T_\mathrm{c}$ for both films exhibit multiple steps. Time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau simulations reproduce the major features of the experimental $I$-$V$ curves and suggest that the resistive transitions for both films are mediated by the formation and growth of normal domains rather than FFI. The single-crystal film with buffer-layer roughness exhibits superconductivity breakdown at higher currents and pinning activation energies approximately twice those of the textured film, along with more pronounced multi-step features in the $I$-$V$ curves. These features are attributed to the combination of stronger pinning induced by lateral variations of the superconducting order parameter along the MgO buffer layer and its lower thermal boundary resistance. Our results show that both the film microstructure and the film-buffer interface are critical for the resistive transition, offering insights for superconducting devices requiring controlled dissipation at high transport currents.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>电流驱动的电阻转变是超导单光子探测器、转变边缘传感器和磁通器件的核心物理过程。根据样品均匀性、尺寸和散热条件的不同，该转变可由相位滑移事件、磁通流不稳定性或正常态畴的形成所驱动。本文研究了两种微观结构缺陷对MgB$_2$薄膜中涡旋动力学的影响：织构薄膜中的柱状生长和单晶薄膜中缓冲层的粗糙度。在$T \approx 0.25 T_\mathrm{c}$下测量的两种薄膜的电流-电压($I$-$V$)曲线均呈现多个台阶。含时金兹堡-朗道模拟重现了实验$I$-$V$曲线的主要特征，并表明两种薄膜的电阻转变均由正常态畴的形成和生长所介导，而非磁通流不稳定性。具有缓冲层粗糙度的单晶薄膜在更高电流下发生超导性击穿，其钉扎激活能约为织构薄膜的两倍，且$I$-$V$曲线中的多台阶特征更为显著。这些特征归因于沿MgO缓冲层的超导序参量横向变化所诱导的更强钉扎效应，以及其较低的热边界电阻共同作用的结果。我们的研究表明，薄膜微观结构和薄膜-缓冲层界面对于电阻转变至关重要，这为需要在高传输电流下实现可控耗散的超导器件提供了设计思路。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | Clemens Schmid et al. |
| 10 | **[Mechanism for Nodal Topological Superconductivity on PtBi$_2$ Surface](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.09994v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Experiments show that the Weyl semimetal PtBi$_2$ hosts unconventional superconductivity in its topological surface states. Hence, the material is a candidate for intrinsic topological superconductivity. Measurements indicate nodal gaps in the center of the Fermi arcs. We derive that anisotropic electron-phonon coupling on Weyl semimetal surfaces, combined with statically screened Coulomb repulsion, is a microscopic mechanism for this nodal pairing. The dominant solution of the linearized gap equation shows nodal gaps when the surface state bandwidth is comparable to the maximum phonon energy, as is the case in PtBi$_2$. We further predict that if the screening of Coulomb interaction on the surface is enhanced by Coulomb engineering, the superconducting gap becomes nodeless, and the critical temperature increases.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>实验表明，外尔半金属PtBi$_2$在其拓扑表面态中承载非常规超导电性，因此该材料是本征拓扑超导体的候选材料。测量结果显示费米弧中心存在节点能隙。我们推导出，外尔半金属表面的各向异性电子-声子耦合与静态屏蔽的库仑排斥相结合，是产生这种节点配对的微观机制。当表面态带宽与最大声子能量相当时（PtBi$_2$即属此情况），线性化能隙方程的主导解呈现节点能隙。我们进一步预测，若通过库仑工程增强表面库仑相互作用的屏蔽，超导能隙将变为无节点的，且临界温度会升高。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | Kristian Mæland et al. |
| 11 | **[Quantum secret sharing in tripartite superconducting network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13643v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting microwave quantum networks is a rapidly developing field, enabling distributed quantum computing and holding a promise for hybrid architectures in quantum internet. Quantum secret sharing (QSS) is one of the key protocols for multipartite quantum networks and can provide an unconditionally secure way to share quantum states among $n$ players. Using microwave two-mode squeezed states as an entanglement resource, we experimentally implement a QSS protocol with $n = 3$, where a subset of at least $k = 2$ players must collaborate to faithfully reconstruct the original secret state. We demonstrate reconstructed-state fidelities that surpass the asymptotic no-cloning threshold of $F_\textrm{nc} = 2/3$ and identify a parameter regime that allows for unconditionally secure communication in the presence of an omnipotent dishonest player. Furthermore, we experimentally explore inherent connections between QSS and other important quantum information processing tasks, such as quantum dense coding and elementary quantum error correction of channel erasures. Finally, we discuss extensions of QSS and its relation to the concept of blind quantum computing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导微波量子网络是一个快速发展的领域，它使得分布式量子计算成为可能，并为量子互联网中的混合架构带来了希望。量子秘密共享是多节点量子网络的关键协议之一，能够为$n$个参与者之间共享量子态提供无条件安全的方式。利用微波双模压缩态作为纠缠资源，我们在实验中实现了$n = 3$的量子秘密共享协议，其中至少需要$k = 2$个参与者协作才能忠实地重构原始秘密态。我们展示的重构态保真度超越了$F_\textrm{nc} = 2/3$的渐近无克隆阈值，并确定了一个参数区域，允许在存在全能不诚实参与者的情况下实现无条件安全通信。此外，我们通过实验探索了量子秘密共享与其他重要量子信息处理任务（如量子密集编码和信道擦除的初级量子纠错）之间的内在联系。最后，我们讨论了量子秘密共享的扩展及其与盲量子计算概念的关系。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | W. K. Yam et al. |
| 12 | **[Measuring quasiparticle dynamics for particle impact reconstruction in a superconducting qubit chip](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13176v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quasiparticle poisoning following particle impacts poses a significant challenge to the development of fault-tolerant superconducting quantum computers, as a sudden excess of quasiparticles can simultaneously degrade the coherence of multiple qubits across large device arrays. In this work, we present a statistical analysis that models the time evolution of radiation-induced qubit energy relaxation through quasiparticle density dynamics. This study provides insight into quasiparticle loss processes by distinguishing between recombination and trapping decay channels and assessing their respective impact on qubit performance. We precisely measure quasiparticle recombination in multiple transmon qubits and uncover an unexpected dependence of qubit relaxation dynamics on deposited energy. By linking correlated relaxation events across qubits to ballistic phonon propagation, we introduce a statistical localization approach to extract the energy deposited in the substrate, which is in good agreement with Monte Carlo simulation. This work establishes the quantitative framework for using an arbitrary subset of superconducting transmon qubits in a QPU as energy-resolving witness particle detectors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>粒子撞击后的准粒子毒化对容错超导量子计算机的发展构成了重大挑战，因为准粒子的突然过量增加会同时降低大型器件阵列中多个量子比特的相干性。本工作提出了一种统计分析模型，通过准粒子密度动力学来模拟辐射诱导的量子比特能量弛豫的时间演化。该研究通过区分复合与俘获这两种衰减通道，并评估它们各自对量子比特性能的影响，从而深入揭示了准粒子损失过程。我们精确测量了多个传输子量子比特中的准粒子复合，并发现了量子比特弛豫动力学对沉积能量存在意想不到的依赖性。通过将不同量子比特间的关联弛豫事件与弹道声子传播联系起来，我们引入了一种统计定位方法来提取衬底中沉积的能量，其结果与蒙特卡洛模拟吻合良好。这项工作建立了一个定量框架，可将量子处理单元中任意子集的超导传输子量子比特用作能量分辨的见证粒子探测器。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | E. Celi et al. |
| 13 | **[Superconductivity near two-dimensional Van Hove singularities: a determinant quantum Monte Carlo study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13161v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting transition temperature $T_c$ of the two-dimensional attractive Hubbard model is computed in the vicinity of both ordinary (logarithmic) and higher-order (power-law) Van Hove singularities using determinant quantum Monte Carlo simulations. For interaction strengths $|U| \lesssim W/3$, where $W$ is the electronic bandwidth, $T_c$ is enhanced in the neighborhood of the Van Hove point, albeit more weakly than expected from weak-coupling BCS theory. Enhancing the Van Hove singularity from logarithmic to power-law yields only a minor additional enhancement of $T_c$. For $|U| \gtrsim W/3$, the maximum $T_c$ shifts away from the Van Hove point and instead occurs at a density unrelated to any features in the non-interacting density of states, consistent with a strong-coupling interpretation. We find that the maximal $T_c$ in the model is achieved at intermediate $U$ and at a density away from the Van Hove point.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟，计算了二维吸引哈伯德模型在普通（对数型）和高阶（幂律型）范霍夫奇点附近的超导转变温度$T_c$。对于相互作用强度$|U| \lesssim W/3$（其中$W$为电子带宽），$T_c$在范霍夫点附近有所增强，尽管增强程度弱于弱耦合BCS理论的预期。将范霍夫奇点从对数型增强至幂律型仅能对$T_c$产生微弱的额外提升。对于$|U| \gtrsim W/3$，最大$T_c$偏离范霍夫点，转而出现在与非相互作用态密度特征无关的某个密度处，这与强耦合解释相一致。我们发现，该模型中的最大$T_c$在中等$U$值且密度偏离范霍夫点时达到。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Gustav Romare et al. |
| 14 | **[Non-degenerate pumping of superconducting resonator parametric amplifier with evidence of phase-sensitive amplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.06155v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting resonator parametric amplifiers are potentially important components for a wide variety of fundamental physics experiments and utilitarian applications. We propose and realise an operating scheme that achieves amplification through the use of non-degenerate pumps, which addresses two key challenges in the design of parametric amplifiers: non-continuous gain across the amplification band and pump tone removal. We have experimentally demonstrated the non-degenerate pumping scheme using a half-wave resonator amplifier based on NbN thin-film, and measured a peak gain of 26 dB and 3-dB bandwidth of 0.5 MHz. The two non-degenerate pump tones were positioned ~10 bandwidths above and below the frequency at which peak gain occurs. We have found the non-degenerate pumping scheme to be more stable compared to the usual degenerate pumping scheme in terms of gain drift over time, by a factor of 4. This scheme also retains the usual flexibility of NbN resonator parametric amplifiers in terms of reliable amplification in a ~4 K environment, and is suitable for cross-harmonic amplification. The use of pump tones at different frequencies allows phase-sensitive amplification when the signal tone is degenerate with the idler tone. A gain of 23 dB and squeezing ratio of 6 dB were measured.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导谐振参量放大器是多种基础物理实验与实用应用中潜在的关键元件。我们提出并实现了一种利用非简并泵浦实现放大的工作方案，该方案解决了参量放大器设计中的两个关键挑战：放大频带内增益不连续以及泵浦信号滤除问题。我们基于氮化铌薄膜半波谐振放大器，通过实验验证了非简并泵浦方案，测得峰值增益为26分贝，3分贝带宽为0.5兆赫兹。两个非简并泵浦频率分别设置在峰值增益频率上下约10倍带宽处。我们发现，与常见的简并泵浦方案相比，非简并泵浦方案在增益随时间漂移方面稳定性更高，漂移量减少了四分之三。该方案还保留了氮化铌谐振参量放大器在约4开尔文环境下可靠放热的常规灵活性，并适用于交叉谐波放大。当信号与闲频简并时，使用不同频率的泵浦可实现相位敏感放大。实验测得增益为23分贝，压缩比为6分贝。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Songyuan Zhao et al. |
| 15 | **[Mass-induced Coulomb drag in capacitively coupled superconducting nanowires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.18943v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate Coulomb drag in a system of two capacitively coupled superconducting nanowires. In this context, drag refers to the appearance of a stationary voltage in the passive wire in response to a current bias applied to the active one. Quantum phase slips (QPS) in the biased wire generate voltage fluctuations that can be transmitted to the other. Using perturbative and semiclassical approaches, we show that when both wires are superconducting the induced voltage vanishes due to exact cancellation of plasmon contributions. By contrast, when the second wire is tuned below the superconductor-insulator transition and develops a mass gap, this cancellation is lifted and a finite drag voltage emerges. The drag coefficient exhibits a crossover from weak drag in short wires to a maximal value set by the mutual capacitance in long wires. A semiclassical picture of voltage pulse propagation clarifies the physical origin of the effect: the mass term synchronizes plasmon modes and prevents complete cancellation of induced signals. Our results establish a mechanism of mass-induced Coulomb drag in low-dimensional superconductors and suggest new routes for probing nonlocal transport near quantum criticality.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了两个电容耦合的超导纳米线系统中的库仑拖拽效应。在此背景下，拖拽效应指在主动线施加电流偏置时，被动线中产生稳态电压的现象。偏置线中的量子相位滑移产生电压涨落，并可传递至另一根线。通过微扰和半经典方法，我们证明当两根线均处于超导态时，由于等离激元贡献的精确抵消，感应电压为零。相反，当第二根线被调控至超导体-绝缘体转变以下并形成能隙时，这种抵消被解除，从而出现有限的拖拽电压。拖拽系数表现出从短导线中的弱拖拽到长导线中由互电容设定的最大值的跨域行为。电压脉冲传播的半经典图像阐明了该效应的物理起源：质量项使等离激元模式同步，并阻止感应信号的完全抵消。我们的研究结果确立了低维超导体中质量诱导库仑拖拽的机制，并为探测量子临界点附近的非局域输运提供了新途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Aleksandr Latyshev et al. |
| 16 | **[Kinetic instability and superconductivity in Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ at ambient pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12367v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ have been proposed as promising candidates for high-temperature superconductors under ambient pressure. While previous studies confirm the dynamic stability of these two thermodynamically unstable systems, their kinetic stability remains to be verified. In this work, we use path integral molecular dynamics simulations to examine the kinetic stability of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ under ambient pressure. We find both compounds are kinetically unstable. Li$_2$AgH$_6$ undergoes lattice collapse, whereas Li$_2$AuH$_6$ retains a stable fluorite-type Li-Au sublattice, but hydrogen atoms partially dimerize into molecules and diffuse within the host lattice. Using the stochastic path-integral approach, which is a nonperturbative approach applicable to systems with diffusive atoms, we investigate the superconductivity of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ in this state. We predict a superconducting transition temperature of 22 K, well below earlier predictions, due to the low density of states at the Fermi level caused by the collapse of hydrogen sublattice and hydrogen dimerization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 和 Li$_2$AgH$_6$ 被提出作为常压下高温超导体的有希望的候选材料。虽然先前研究证实了这两个热力学不稳定体系的动力学稳定性，但其动力学稳定性仍有待验证。在本工作中，我们利用路径积分分子动力学模拟研究了常压下 Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 和 Li$_2$AgH$_6$ 的动力学稳定性。我们发现两种化合物均具有动力学不稳定性。Li$_2$AgH$_6$ 发生晶格坍塌，而 Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 虽能保持稳定的萤石型 Li-Au 亚晶格，但氢原子部分二聚成分子并在主晶格内扩散。利用适用于扩散原子体系的非微扰方法——随机路径积分方法，我们研究了 Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 在此状态下的超导电性。我们预测其超导转变温度为22开尔文，远低于先前的预测，这是由于氢亚晶格坍塌和氢二聚化导致费米能级处态密度降低所致。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Yucheng Ding et al. |
| 17 | **[Charge-4e/6e superconductivity and chiral metal from 3D chiral superconductor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12328v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Unconventional superconductivity (SC) characterized by multi-fermion orderings has attracted substantial attention. However, previous studies have largely focused on 2D systems or 3D systems with effective 2D symmetries. Here, we investigate the vestigial phases arising from thermal fluctuations of chiral SC in 3D systems governed by the cubic $O_h$ point group. By constructing low-energy effective Hamiltonians via Ginzburg-Landau analysis and conducting Monte Carlo simulations, we systematically investigate the phase fluctuations of chiral orders within the $E_g$ and $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ irreducible representations (IRRPs). We identify a phase diagram topology different from 2D counterparts, where the multi-phase intersection manifests as a tetracritical point rather than the triple point typically found in 2D systems. We elucidate the evolution of these phases under thermal fluctuations. Our findings reveal that for both $E_g$ and $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ IRRPs, the primary chiral orders could melt into a chiral metallic phase across specific parameter regimes. Moreover, for the $E_g$ IRRP, phase fluctuation could also induce a charge-$4e$ phase under certain regime, while for the $T_{2g}$ and $T_{1u}$ IRRPs, it leads to a higher-order charge-$6e$ SC state. Our work paves the way for exploring exotic vestigial orders driven by non-trivial 3D crystalline symmetries.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>以多费米子序为特征的非传统超导电性引起了广泛关注。然而，先前研究主要集中在二维系统或具有有效二维对称性的三维系统上。在此，我们研究了由立方 $O_h$ 点群支配的三维系统中手性超导序的热涨落所产生的遗迹相。通过金兹堡-朗道分析构建低能有效哈密顿量并进行蒙特卡洛模拟，我们系统地研究了 $E_g$ 和 $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ 不可约表示内手性序的相位涨落。我们识别出与二维系统不同的相图拓扑结构，其中多相交点表现为四临界点，而非二维系统中常见的三重点。我们阐明了这些相在热涨落下的演化。我们的研究结果表明，对于 $E_g$ 和 $T_{2g}/T_{1u$ 不可约表示，原始手性序在特定参数范围内可能融化为手性金属相。此外，对于 $E_g$ 不可约表示，相位涨落在一定条件下也可能诱导出电荷-$4e$ 相；而对于 $T_{2g}$ 和 $T_{1u}$ 不可约表示，则会导致更高阶的电荷-$6e$ 超导态。我们的工作为探索由非平凡三维晶体对称性驱动的奇异遗迹序开辟了道路。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Chu-Tian Gao et al. |
| 18 | **[Nanoscale electrothermal-switch superconducting diode for electrically programmable superconducting circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12313v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting diodes enable dissipationless directional transport, yet achieving electrical tunability and scalability remains a major challenge for circuit-level integration. Here, we demonstrate an electrothermal-switch superconducting diode in which a gate-controlled nanoscale hotspot dynamically breaks inversion symmetry in a superconducting nanowire. This mechanism gives rise to two coexisting nonreciprocal transport regimes-one associated with a nonreciprocal superconducting-to-normal transition and the other with ratchet-like vortex dynamics-both originating from the same electrothermal-switch process. The diode exhibits efficiencies up to 42% and 60% for the two regimes, respectively, and can be electrically switched on, off, or reversed in polarity in situ by applying a small gate current. These capabilities enable programmable superconducting circuits that realize electrically reconfigurable full-wave and half-wave rectification. The lithography-compatible design, high performance, and gate-controlled functionality establish a scalable platform for programmable superconducting electronics and hybrid quantum systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管可实现无耗散的方向性输运，但实现电可调性与可扩展性仍是电路级集成的主要挑战。在此，我们展示了一种电热开关超导二极管，其中栅极控制的纳米尺度热点动态地打破了超导纳米线中的反演对称性。该机制产生了两种共存的非互易输运区域——一种与非互易的超导-正常态转变相关，另一种与类棘轮涡旋动力学相关——两者均源于同一电热开关过程。该二极管在两种区域下的效率分别高达42%和60%，并且可通过施加小的栅极电流原位实现电开关、关闭或极性反转。这些功能使得可编程超导电路能够实现电可重构的全波和半波整流。这种光刻兼容的设计、高性能以及栅控功能，为可编程超导电子学和混合量子系统建立了一个可扩展的平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Tianyu Li et al. |
| 19 | **[Raman response in superconducting multiorbital systems with application to nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11997v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The recent discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in pressurized and thin film nickelates is nowadays one of the most relevant and active topics in solid-state physics. The origin of superconductivity together with the relevance of multiorbital physics are highly discussed issues in this field. Knowledge of the size of the gap and its symmetry is of fundamental interest to uncover the superconducting mechanism at play in the nickelates. Electronic Raman scattering is a powerful tool to investigate the main characteristics of the gap. Here, we investigate the Raman response in the superconducting phase for three different models: Two-orbital models, including $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and $d_{z^2}$ orbitals, with one and two layers; as well as a bilayer model with the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital as the only active one. For each of these models, we consider different pairing symmetries and determine their characteristic fingerprints in the Raman response. For the two-orbital models, we perform full multiorbital calculations including interorbital and intraorbital scattering, and compare the results with those obtained using the additive Raman response where each band is considered separately. Our results should be useful for discussing the minimal model for superconductivity and its pairing symmetry in nickelates. The obtained results and discussions, as well as the presented formalism, are also of general interest for other multiorbital systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期在加压及薄膜镍酸盐中发现的高温超导现象，已成为凝聚态物理领域最受关注且活跃的研究课题之一。该领域中，超导性的起源以及多轨道物理的相关性均是备受争议的核心议题。掌握能隙的大小及其对称性，对于揭示镍酸盐中超导机制的本质具有根本性意义。电子拉曼散射是研究能隙主要特征的有力工具。本文中，我们研究了三种不同模型在超导相中的拉曼响应：包含$d_{x^2-y^2}$和$d_{z^2}$轨道的双轨道模型（涉及单层与双层结构），以及仅以$d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道为活性轨道的双层模型。针对每种模型，我们考虑了不同的配对对称性，并确定了它们在拉曼响应中的特征指纹。对于双轨道模型，我们进行了包含轨道间散射和轨道内散射的完整多轨道计算，并将结果与采用叠加拉曼响应（即各能带被单独考虑）所得的结果进行了比较。我们的研究结果应有助于探讨镍酸盐超导性的最小模型及其配对对称性。所获得的结果与讨论，以及所呈现的形式体系，对于其他多轨道系统也具有普遍的参考价值。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Matías Bejas et al. |
| 20 | **[Bulk-dissociated topological bands without spin-orbit coupling in hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08675v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Topological superconductors (TSCs) in superconducting hybrid heterostructures, which integrate superconducting and non-superconducting materials, have been intensely investigated with the hope of discovering exotic non-Abelian anyons for fault-tolerant quantum computing. In this effort, a challenge for hybrid superconducting systems is controlling hybridization, which is often a balance between enhancing the superconducting proximity effect at the cost of suppressing desirable electronic properties such as strong spin-orbit interactions. Hence, discovering hybrid superconducting systems with topological properties controlled and enhanced by material geometry design without spin-orbit interactions would be intriguing to explore. In this work, we theoretically study a square superconducting network decorated with spin-polarized magnetic adatoms. We find that localized Yu-Shiba-Rusinov bound states at magnetic adatom sites collectively form a weak topological superconducting phase despite the absence of spin-orbit interactions. We then demonstrate that by tuning the Fermi energy of the network, the system can transition from a weak TSC phase to a bulk-dissociated TSC phase where the edge state bands separate from the bulk, giving rise to unexpected features such as nodal lines and co-existing bulk-dissociated edge and corner modes. Moreover, our findings highlight how hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials can serve as a useful template for controlling the coupling and dissociation between electronic degrees of freedom of different dimensionalities.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在由超导与非超导材料集成的超导混合异质结构中，拓扑超导体（TSCs）已被深入研究，以期发现可用于容错量子计算的奇异非阿贝尔任意子。在此过程中，混合超导系统面临的一个挑战是控制杂化，这通常需要在增强超导邻近效应与抑制诸如强自旋-轨道相互作用等理想电子特性之间取得平衡。因此，探索一种无需自旋-轨道相互作用、仅通过材料几何设计即可控制和增强拓扑特性的混合超导系统将极具研究价值。本工作中，我们从理论上研究了一种装饰有自旋极化磁性吸附原子的正方形超导网络。我们发现，尽管没有自旋-轨道相互作用，磁性吸附原子位点处的局域Yu-Shiba-Rusinov束缚态会共同形成一个弱拓扑超导相。随后我们证明，通过调节网络的费米能，系统可以从弱拓扑超导相转变为体解离拓扑超导相，其中边缘态能带与体态分离，并产生诸如节线以及体解离的边缘态与角态共存等意想不到的特征。此外，我们的研究结果凸显了异维超导超材料如何作为一个有用的模板，用于控制不同维度电子自由度之间的耦合与解离。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Joseph J. Cuozzo et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Spinon mediation of witness spin dynamics in herbertsmithite](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.11678v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The kagome lattice of spin-1/2 copper atoms in herbertsmithite is conjectured to sustain a quantum spin liquid state with spinon quasiparticles. Ideally, the kagome crystal planes are each separated by a plane of spinless zinc atoms. However, in real crystals some spin-1/2 copper atoms substitute randomly onto these inter-kagome zinc sites. Here we reconceptualize such 'impurity' atoms as quantum witness spins whose dynamics is designed to probe the spin liquid state. We then introduce spin noise spectroscopy to measure the frequency and temperature dependence of witness spin dynamics, demonstrating that their phenomenology is consistent with extensive interactions between witness spins mediated by propagation of spinons through a quantum spin liquid. Ultimately, a sharp transition occurs at around 260 mK, below which the properties of both spin noise and magnetic susceptibility suggest that the witness spins form a spin glass phase. Among theoretical models considered, we demonstrate that our observations are only consistent with spinon-mediated interactions between witness spins by either a Z2 or U(1) quantum spin liquid, with the former model more closely matching the data. Our work demonstrates that quantum mechanical witness spins may now conceivably be used as a widely applicable probe of quantum spin liquid physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>赫伯特史密斯石中自旋-1/2铜原子构成的笼目晶格被推测可维持具有自旋子准粒子的量子自旋液体态。理想情况下，笼目晶格平面之间由一层无自旋的锌原子平面分隔。然而，在实际晶体中，部分自旋-1/2铜原子会随机取代这些笼目层间的锌位点。本研究将这些"杂质"原子重新概念化为量子见证自旋，其动力学被设计用于探测自旋液体态。我们随后引入自旋噪声谱技术来测量见证自旋动力学的频率与温度依赖性，证明其现象学符合通过量子自旋液体中自旋子传播介导的见证自旋间广泛相互作用。最终在约260毫K处发生急剧转变，低于该温度时，自旋噪声与磁化率的特性均表明见证自旋形成了自旋玻璃相。在考察的理论模型中，我们证明观测结果仅与Z2或U(1)量子自旋液体介导的见证自旋间自旋子相互作用相符，其中前者模型与数据吻合更佳。我们的工作表明，量子力学见证自旋如今可被视为一种广泛适用的量子自旋液体物理探测工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Hiroto Takahashi et al. |
| 2 | **[Dynamics of spin glasses in two dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13480v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Spin glass dynamics is a strong function of spatial dimensionality $D$. The lower critical dimension is close to 2.5, so that, in two dimensions, the condensation temperature $T_\text{g}=0$, and only fluctuations are present at finite temperatures. However, by using thin film multilayers, one can explore the dynamics in both $D=3$ and $D=2$ dimensions. Spin glass thin film multilayers transition from $D=3$ dynamics at short to intermediate times to $D = 2$ dynamics at long times. Correlation lengths of CuMn 4.5 nm multilayers at long times are shown to be grow more rapidly in $D=2$ as compared to $D=3$, and for the longest measurement time, experimentally reach equilibrium in qualitative agreement with simulations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>自旋玻璃动力学是空间维度 $D$ 的强函数。其下临界维度接近 2.5，因此在二维情况下，凝聚温度 $T_\text{g}=0$，有限温度下仅存在涨落。然而，通过使用薄膜多层结构，可以同时探索 $D=3$ 和 $D=2$ 维度的动力学。自旋玻璃薄膜多层结构的动力学在短到中等时间尺度上表现为 $D=3$ 维度行为，而在长时间尺度上过渡到 $D=2$ 维度行为。研究表明，CuMn 4.5 nm 多层结构在长时间尺度下的关联长度在 $D=2$ 中比在 $D=3$ 中增长得更快，并且在最长的测量时间内，实验上达到了与模拟结果在定性上一致的平衡。</p></details> | 2026-04-15 | Hongze Li et al. |
| 3 | **[On the nature of the spin glass transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.20163v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We recently showed that the two-dimensional Ising spin glass allows for a line of renormalization group fixed points which explains properties observed in numerical studies. We observe that this exact result corresponds to enhancement to a one-generator continuous internal symmetry. This finally explains why no finite temperature transition to a spin glass phase is observed in two dimensions. In more than two dimensions, instead, the continuous symmetry can be broken spontaneously and yields a spin glass order parameter which, for fixed temperature and disorder strength, takes continuous values in an interval. Such a feature is shared by the order parameter of the known mean field solution of the model with infinite-range interactions, which corresponds to infinitely many dimensions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们近期研究表明，二维伊辛自旋玻璃存在一条重正化群不动点线，这解释了数值研究中观测到的特性。我们注意到这一精确结果对应着单生成元连续内对称性的增强。这最终解释了为何在二维体系中未观测到向自旋玻璃相的有限温度相变。而在超过二维的情况下，连续对称性可发生自发破缺，并产生一个自旋玻璃序参量——在固定温度和无序强度下，该序参量在区间内取连续值。此特征与已知的无限长程相互作用模型（对应无限维情形）的平均场解中的序参量特性一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Gesualdo Delfino et al. |
| 4 | **[Stoichiometry-Controlled Structural Order and Tunable Antiferromagnetism in $\mathrm{Fe}_{x}\mathrm{NbSe_2}$ ($0.05 \le x \le 0.38$)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.18993v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) enable magnetic property engineering via intercalation, but stoichiometry-structure-magnetism correlations remain poorly defined for Fe-intercalated $\mathrm{NbSe_2}$. Here, we report a systematic study of $\mathrm{Fe}_{x}\mathrm{NbSe_2}$ across an extended composition range $0.05 \le x \le 0.38$, synthesized via chemical vapor transport and verified by rigorous energy-dispersive x-ray spectroscopy (EDS) microanalysis. X-ray diffraction, magnetic, and transport measurements reveal an intrinsic correlation between Fe content, structural ordering, and magnetic ground states. With increasing $x$, the system undergoes a successive transition from paramagnetism to a spin-glass state, then to long-range antiferromagnetism (AFM), and ultimately to a reentrant spin-glass phase, with the transition temperatures exhibiting a nonmonotonic dependence on Fe content. The maximum Néel temperature ($T_{\mathrm{N}}$ = $\mathrm{175K}$) and strongest AFM coupling occur at $x=0.25$, where Fe atoms form a well-ordered $2a_0 \times 2a_0 $ superlattice within van der Waals gaps. Beyond $x = 0.25$, the superlattice transforms or disorders, weakening Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) interactions and significantly reducing $T_{\mathrm{N}}$. Electrical transport exhibits distinct anomalies at magnetic transition temperatures, corroborating the magnetic state evolution. Our work extends the compositional boundary of Fe-intercalated $\mathrm{NbSe_2}$, establishes precise stoichiometry-structure-magnetism correlations, and identifies structural ordering as a key tuning parameter for AFM. These findings provide a quantitative framework for engineering altermagnetic or switchable antiferromagnetic states in van der Waals materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>过渡金属二硫族化合物（TMDs）可通过插层实现磁性调控，但对于铁插层二硒化铌（$\mathrm{NbSe_2}$），其化学计量-结构-磁性关联仍不明确。本研究通过化学气相传输法合成了宽组分范围（$0.05 \le x \le 0.38$）的$\mathrm{Fe}_{x}\mathrm{NbSe_2}$样品，并采用严格的能量色散X射线光谱（EDS）微区分析进行验证。X射线衍射、磁性与输运测量揭示了铁含量、结构有序度和磁性基态之间的本征关联。随着$x$增大，体系经历从顺磁性到自旋玻璃态，再到长程反铁磁性（AFM），最终进入重入自旋玻璃相的连续转变，其转变温度对铁含量呈非单调依赖。最高奈尔温度（$T_{\mathrm{N}}$ = $\mathrm{175K}$）和最强反铁磁耦合出现在$x=0.25$处，此时铁原子在范德瓦尔斯间隙中形成有序的$2a_0 \times 2a_0 $超晶格。当$x > 0.25$时，超晶格发生转变或无序化，削弱了RKKY相互作用并显著降低$T_{\mathrm{N}}$。电输运特性在磁转变温度处呈现明显异常，印证了磁性态的演化。本研究拓展了铁插层$\mathrm{NbSe_2}$的组分边界，建立了精确的化学计量-结构-磁性关联，并指出结构有序化是调控反铁磁性的关键参数。这些发现为在范德瓦尔斯材料中设计交变磁性或可切换反铁磁态提供了定量框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Xiaotong Xu et al. |
| 5 | **[Epigenetic feedback reshapes dynamical landscapes in gene regulatory networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.24427v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding how gene regulatory networks (GRNs) give rise to stable and dynamic cellular states remains a central challenge in theoretical biology, particularly when slow epigenetic feedback reshapes the underlying regulatory landscape. While experimental approaches such as single-cell transcriptomics reveal rich dynamical behaviour, a tractable theoretical framework that links gene expression, epigenetic control, and collective dynamics remains challenging. Here, we develop an extended Dynamical Mean Field Theory (DMFT) framework for GRNs that incorporates epigenetic modifications as slow, feedback-driven variables. Building on the analogy between Hopfield networks and spin glass systems, we derive effective stochastic equations that reduce high-dimensional dynamics to a tractable form across multiple timescales. This formulation enables quantitative characterization of both stable and oscillatory regimes and reveals how epigenetic feedback reshapes the effective potential landscape governing cell fate decisions. Our model shows how epigenetic feedback regulation dynamically reshapes the Waddington landscape. Our results and methodology provide a unified theoretical framework for understanding developmental dynamics and epigenetic reprogramming in complex biological systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解基因调控网络（GRNs）如何产生稳定和动态的细胞状态，尤其是当缓慢的表观遗传反馈重塑底层调控景观时，仍是理论生物学的核心挑战。虽然单细胞转录组学等实验方法揭示了丰富的动力学行为，但建立连接基因表达、表观遗传调控与集体动力学的可处理理论框架仍具挑战性。本研究针对GRNs发展了一个扩展的动力学平均场理论（DMFT）框架，将表观遗传修饰作为缓慢的反馈驱动变量纳入其中。基于霍普菲尔德网络与自旋玻璃系统的类比，我们推导出有效随机方程，将高维动力学简化为跨越多时间尺度的可处理形式。该框架实现了对稳定态与振荡态的定量表征，并揭示了表观遗传反馈如何重塑控制细胞命运决策的有效势能景观。我们的模型展示了表观遗传反馈调控如何动态重塑沃丁顿景观。研究结果与方法为理解复杂生物系统中的发育动力学与表观遗传重编程提供了统一的理论框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Sascha H. Hauck et al. |
| 6 | **[Quasi-linear `non-metallic' resistivity in the distorted-kagome metal CrPdAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11630v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report the growth and characterization of single crystals of the disorted-kagome lattice compound CrPdAs. Spin-glass behaviour with $T_{SG} \sim 60\ {\rm K}$ is observed in all crystals tested. Some growths show in addition a magnetic impurity phase with $T_c$ around 200 K, but annealing produces single-phase crystals without the ferromagnetic impurity phase. Single-phase crystals nevertheless have $29\pm 5\%$ anti-site disorder of the Cr and Pd sites, similar to a previous generation of flux-grown polycrystalline samples. We observe a large linear-coefficient of the heat capacity at low temperature, $γ= 23 \pm 3$ mJ/mole\,K$^2$, which is typical of kagome metals. The calculated band structure shows several Dirac band-crossings very near $E_F$ whose degeneracy is lifted when spin-orbit interaction is included. Our most curious finding is a `non-metallic' in-plane resistivity, extending over the entire measured temperature range from 300 K down to 2 K. This resistivity is quasi-linear below about 130 K, and shows no sign of saturation down to the lowest temperature measured.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了扭曲Kagome晶格化合物CrPdAs单晶的生长与表征。在所有测试的晶体中均观察到自旋玻璃行为，其自旋玻璃转变温度$T_{SG} \sim 60\ {\rm K}$。部分生长批次还显示出$T_c$约200 K的磁性杂质相，但退火处理可生成不含铁磁杂质相的单相晶体。尽管如此，单相晶体中Cr位和Pd位仍存在$29\pm 5\%$的反位缺陷，这与前代助熔剂法生长的多晶样品情况相似。我们在低温下观测到较大的热容线性系数$γ= 23 \pm 3$ mJ/mol·K$^2$，这是Kagome金属的典型特征。计算的能带结构显示在$E_F$附近存在多个狄拉克能带交叉点，当计入自旋轨道耦合作用时，这些简并会被解除。我们最引人注目的发现是面内电阻率呈现“非金属性”，这一特性在从300 K到2 K的整个测量温区内持续存在。该电阻率在约130 K以下呈准线性，且在测量最低温下也未出现饱和迹象。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Benny Lau et al. |
| 7 | **[Heterophily as a generative mechanism for self-organized synergistic interdependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11545v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding what and how causal dynamical mechanisms generate collective phenomena is a central challenge in complexity science. Recent studies have focused on identifying the mechanisms underlying the synergistic interdependencies that characterise these phenomena in systems with fixed interaction structures. Yet, real-world systems displaying collective phenomena, such as brains, societies, and ecosystems, are adaptive: interactions change in time. Here, we show that heterophily is a minimal local adaptive mechanism for the emergence of self-organized synergistic interdependencies. We study a paradigmatic spin-glass-like model with co-evolving couplings to show how heterophily generates the conditions for synergy to emerge. By solving the minimal $N=3$ case analytically, we reveal the precise mechanism: heterophily weakens pairwise dependencies while inducing high-order dependencies via geometric constraints on the configurations it selects. Together, these two effects underpin synergy. Numerical simulations confirm that this mechanism persists in large systems and that it is robust under parameter heterogeneities and dynamics. We demonstrate the applicability of our results by showing how heterophily can disrupt polarization while promoting synergistic information dynamics of opinions, where individuals' opinions are better explained by group-level influences than by pairwise ones. These results offer a parsimonious route to self-organized synergistic interdependencies in information-processing systems, with potential applications in computational social science, neuroscience, and biology.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解何种因果动力学机制以及它们如何产生集体现象，是复杂性科学的核心挑战。近期研究侧重于识别在具有固定交互结构的系统中，表征这些现象的协同相互依赖性的底层机制。然而，现实世界中展现集体现象的系统（如大脑、社会和生态系统）具有适应性：交互作用随时间变化。本文证明，异质性是一种能促使自组织协同相互依赖性出现的最小局部适应机制。我们研究了一个具有共演化耦合的典型自旋玻璃类模型，以揭示异质性如何为协同性的涌现创造条件。通过解析求解最小$N=3$情形，我们揭示了精确机制：异质性削弱了成对依赖性，同时通过对其所选构型施加几何约束而诱导出高阶依赖性。这两种效应共同构成了协同性的基础。数值模拟证实该机制在大规模系统中持续存在，并且在参数异质性和动力学变化下具有鲁棒性。我们通过展示异质性如何能瓦解极化同时促进观点的协同信息动力学（其中个体观点由群体层面影响而非成对影响能更好地解释），证明了我们结果的适用性。这些结果为信息处理系统中自组织协同相互依赖性提供了一条简约的路径，在计算社会科学、神经科学和生物学中具有潜在应用价值。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Enrico Caprioglio et al. |
| 8 | **[Tensor-Network Population Annealing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11155v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a hybrid sampling method, tensor-network population annealing (TNPA), which combines tensor-network (TN) initialization with population annealing (PA). We apply this method to the two-dimensional Edwards-Anderson Ising spin glass. The approach is motivated by the limitations of existing methods: TN-based samplers can become numerically unstable in frustrated spin systems at low temperatures, whereas conventional PA requires a long annealing schedule when started from the high-temperature limit. In TNPA, TN contractions are used only within a reliable temperature range to generate initial configurations that are close to the equilibrium distribution. The subsequent low-temperature equilibration is then carried out by PA. To stabilize the initialization process, we introduce a diagnostic based on the effective sample size that adaptively selects the initialization temperature. The proposed framework provides a practical and physically motivated route to low-temperature sampling by combining the complementary strengths of TN and PA.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一种混合采样方法——张量网络群体退火（TNPA），该方法将张量网络（TN）初始化与群体退火（PA）相结合。我们将此方法应用于二维爱德华兹-安德森伊辛自旋玻璃。该方法的提出源于现有方法的局限性：基于TN的采样器在低温下的阻挫自旋系统中可能变得数值不稳定，而传统的PA从高温极限开始时需要很长的退火方案。在TNPA中，TN缩并仅在一个可靠的温度范围内使用，以生成接近平衡分布的初始构型。随后的低温平衡过程则由PA执行。为了稳定初始化过程，我们引入了一种基于有效样本量的诊断方法，以自适应地选择初始化温度。所提出的框架通过结合TN和PA的互补优势，为低温采样提供了一条实用且具有物理动机的途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Takumi Oshima et al. |
| 9 | **[Emergent Topological Universality and Marginal Replica Symmetry Breaking in Gauge-Correlated Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10309v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent tensor-network samplings of modified Nishimori spin glasses have revealed robust finite-temperature critical transitions in two dimensions, defying the standard Edwards-Anderson lower critical dimension boundary ($d_{l}\approx2.5$). We present a theoretical framework demonstrating that the discrete $Z_{2}$ gauge constraints utilized to bypass Monte Carlo kinetic traps fundamentally alter the system's universality class. By mapping the algorithmic disorder distribution to the 2D Ising Conformal Field Theory (CFT), we prove the emergent spatial variance generates a fractional momentum operator that drives the dynamic upper critical dimension to zero ($d_{u}\rightarrow0$). This marginal topology dynamically suppresses the replica-coupling vertices, yielding an infinite-order Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transition and a non-integrable replicon divergence that predicts a massive instability toward 1-step Replica Symmetry Breaking (1-RSB). Leveraging a spectral Corner Transfer Matrix Renormalization Group (CTMRG) architecture up to macroscopic scales ($L=1024$), we quantitatively validate the topological scaling argument $\mathcal{G}((T-T_{c})\ln(L/L_{0}))$. By isolating the continuum field theory from microscopic lattice artifacts, we recover the fundamental lattice metric $L_{0}\approx 0.94$, unequivocally confirming the existence of a distinct, topologically driven spin-glass phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期对修正西岛自旋玻璃的张量网络采样揭示了二维系统中存在鲁棒的有限温度临界相变，这挑战了标准的爱德华兹-安德森下临界维边界（$d_{l}\approx2.5$）。我们提出了一个理论框架，证明用于规避蒙特卡洛动力学陷阱的离散$Z_{2}$规范约束从根本上改变了系统的普适类。通过将算法无序分布映射到二维伊辛共形场论（CFT），我们证明了涌现的空间方差产生了一个分数动量算符，该算符将动力学上临界维驱动至零（$d_{u}\rightarrow0$）。这种边缘拓扑动态地抑制了副本耦合顶点，产生了一个无穷阶的别列津斯基-科斯特利茨-索利斯（BKT）相变和一个不可积的副本模发散，这预言了朝向一步副本对称破缺（1-RSB）的巨大不稳定性。利用直至宏观尺度（$L=1024$）的光谱角转移矩阵重整化群（CTMRG）架构，我们定量验证了拓扑标度论证$\mathcal{G}((T-T_{c})\ln(L/L_{0}))$。通过将连续场论与微观晶格细节隔离，我们恢复了基本晶格度量$L_{0}\approx 0.94$，明确证实了一个独特的、拓扑驱动的自旋玻璃相的存在。</p></details> | 2026-04-11 | Alok Yadav et al. |
